p.text:
Transcript parsed. Now identifying features and firing parallel `match_tickets` calls for all major workflows.

**Features identified:**
1. Item Card (Description, Category, Storage, Valuation Group, Tags, Brand, Manufacturer, Product Code)
2. Units Card — Non-Food pack sizes, 3-tier max, Higher/Lower, Sub-Qty, costing
3. Units Card — Food items: Food/Non-Food + Fluid/Non-Fluid selection, serving sizes
4. Linking Servings to Pack sizes, Inventory Ready flag, Base Unit promotion
5. GTIN/UPC barco
